_comment: Filters that determine which models appear in each routing role's menu. Edit these to control your choices.

default.description: Routine code edits, completions, file modifications

think.description: Architecture decisions, complex debugging, multi-step planning

background.description: Boilerplate, simple file reads, formatting — speed over quality

longContext.description: Analyzing large files or codebases (threshold from CCR config)

image.description: Screenshots, diagrams, UI verification — must support vision

webSearch.description: Queries needing current information — needs tool-calling support
